## Collisions (auto-suffixed with -N)

- `m08-mb-list`: `merc-list`, `mercenary`
- `m08-mb-detail`: `merc-detail`, `mercenary-detail`
- `m09-mb-list`: `tourn-list`, `tourn`
- `m09-mb-flow-bracket`: `tourn-detail-refresh`, `tourn-detail-domain-refresh`, `tournaments-bracket-conflict`
- `m14-mb-flow-checkout`: `pay-checkout`, `checkout`
- `m14-mb-state-success`: `pay-success-refresh`, `pay-success-v2`
- `m14-mb-main`: `pay-history-refresh`, `pay-history-v2`, `payments-state-edge`, `payments-receipt-settlement`
- `m12-mb-list`: `chat-list`, `community-chat-list`
